name: The UI Performs the Wrong Action
description: The UI performs the wrong action with respect to the user's request. The actual behavior deviates from the intended specification, causing the system to execute an unintended operation which may have security implications.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node (user action) is routed through a STRUCTURAL UI component to a CONTROL node that executes a different action than what the user requested. The TRANSFORM between user intent and system action produces an incorrect mapping, without a CONTROL node that validates action correctness.
